name: MCI, Inc.
description: MCI, Inc. was a prominent American telecommunications company that served as a leading global communications provider. It delivered innovative, cost-effective, and advanced communications connectivity solutions to a diverse client base, including businesses, government entities, and individual consumers. Renowned for operating one of the industry's most expansive global Internet Protocol (IP) backbones, the company played a significant role in the telecommunications landscape before its acquisition by Verizon Communications in 2006. MCI was headquartered in Ashburn, Virginia, and was publicly traded on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol MCIP during its final years as an independent entity.
